steps.title: Locate the table cell
steps.content: The question asks for members ages 14-17 in 1995. That means using the Seniors row and the 1995 column.

steps.title: Compare the values
steps.content: Choice A gives Seniors in 1994; Choice C gives Juniors in 1995; Choice D comes from a different row or year. Choice B gives the Seniors 1995 value, 52 thousand. The answer is B.
